what_problem_it_solves: Provides the immediately preceding excerpt this fragment depends on
main_benefit: Recovers local continuity without global search
main_risk: Still too weak if the backward scope spans more than that one excerpt

what_problem_it_solves: Lets the owner inspect the whole earlier instructional stretch the fragment depends on
main_risk: Needs exact passage targeting rather than vague linking
preferred_use_case: Scope phrases that reach back beyond one small excerpt

what_problem_it_solves: Carries a later governing line back into earlier excerpts it semantically controls
main_benefit: Protects earlier fragments from silent scope loss
main_risk: Blind duplication if not dependency-checked first
preferred_use_case: When a later sentence governs earlier omitted actions

what_problem_it_solves: Warns the owner that something relevant was omitted from the middle
main_risk: Not enough by itself if exact recovery is still missing

what_problem_it_solves: Frames the fragment as hadith explanation and flags live backward dependencies
main_benefit: Restores peace of heart and identity clarity
main_risk: Becomes cosmetic if it is not paired with exact source recovery
preferred_use_case: Support layer alongside exact linkage or passage view
